---
title: "Organizational Purpose as a Costly Signal in Tight Labor Markets"
author: "Miguel Oseguera"
date: today
format: pdf
---

<!-- This is the Quarto source file for the main paper.
     Edit this file, then run render_all.sh to generate PDF and .tex output.
     The .tex output syncs to Overleaf via sync_to_overleaf.sh. -->

# Introduction

<!-- TODO: Port content from Overleaf Current Draft.tex -->

# Literature Review

# Theoretical Framework

# Data and Sample Construction

# Empirical Strategy

# Results

# Robustness Checks

# Discussion

# Conclusion

# References {.unnumbered}
